description: Create a scatter plot in RStudio using ggplot2 to visualize the relationship between penguin flipper length (flipper_length_mm on the x-axis) and body mass (body_mass_g on the y-axis) from the dataset at /home/ga/RProjects/datasets/penguins.csv. The plot must include a title and axis labels. Save the visualization to /home/ga/RProjects/output/penguin_scatter.png.
